_format: Two-tier. Tier 1 (decisions): architectural and design decisions per session — decision, rationale, affected chunk. Tier 2 (implementation): short entries during implementation — attempted, outcome, decided. No narrative prose in either tier.

entries.decision: Hybrid representation model rejected
entries.rationale: Leaf attributes counter to design philosophy — complexity absorbed upward through hierarchy

entries.decision: Base substrate: directed graphs, binary edge types, no node typing, no weights
entries.rationale: Minimal base; richer substrates as empirical upgrade paths

entries.decision: Binary edge typing fixed at two globally: structural and operational
entries.rationale: Reduces isomorphism complexity via regime-separated matching; does not clutter rule space

entries.decision: Substrate upgrades are manual researcher decisions at training start
entries.rationale: Automation not warranted at this level

entries.decision: Two-level evaluation principle adopted
entries.rationale: Every substrate decision must hold for both traveler and second system

entries.decision: Second system design deferred
entries.rationale: Traveler behavior should inform second system design, not the reverse

entries.decision: Graph Operation Interface defined with five operation groups
entries.rationale: Abstraction layer enables substrate swapping without touching core logic

entries.decision: q_07-q_09 added as critical open questions
entries.rationale: Hypergraph necessity and isomorphism cost unresolved — empirical decision gates

entries.decision: Layer structure framing corrected
entries.rationale: Layer identity is representational scale, not operation type. Reversibility is system-wide, not layer-specific.

entries.decision: Layer boundary definition: earned through GA convergence, not assigned
entries.rationale: Subgraph becomes upper-layer node when GA converges on consistent production for a given label

entries.decision: GA is load-bearing for prototype
entries.rationale: Fixed rules cannot achieve label-conditioned reproducibility across expressions

entries.decision: Fitness signal: label-conditioned reproducibility (minimize variance in subgraph output per label)
entries.rationale: Resolves q_02 and q_04; eliminates cold start circularity

entries.decision: q_07-q_09 reframed as empirical decision gates
entries.rationale: Not pre-roadmap blockers — answered by Phase 6 test results

entries.decision: Prototype roadmap created, 6 phases plus 5b
entries.rationale: Scope bounded to base prototype with GA included

entries.decision: Session log restructured to two-tier format
entries.rationale: Narrative logs do not scale into implementation phase

entries.decision: MemoryAccess restructured as general memory system with projects namespace
entries.rationale: Knowledge base is not project-specific

entries.decision: Project Perspective content migrated to projects.perspective.* namespace
entries.rationale: Separates project-specific content from general memory domains

entries.decision: General domains kept clean: meta, notes, entities
entries.rationale: Cross-project knowledge must not be entangled with any single project

entries.decision: Project named perspective, not traveler
entries.rationale: Correct project name from session 7 project setup

entries.decision: P5b precedes P5
entries.rationale: Traversal loop requires converged rules to produce meaningful output

entries.decision: P3 exit condition: placeholder boundaries as explicit scaffold
entries.rationale: GA not yet running at P3 — boundaries earned through convergence is a P5b success signal

entries.decision: Risks assigned to phases: burn-in at P5b, GI cost at P5, parameter growth at P3
entries.rationale: Floating risks without phase assignments are discovered during implementation, not anticipated

entries.decision: P6 reframed as binary gate with explicit pass/fail
entries.rationale: Implicit treatment of hyperedge fail as unlikely was not declared — both outcomes acceptable and should be stated

entries.decision: P6 fail path is additive — k=2 recycles as hypergraph seed
entries.rationale: Directed graph is hypergraph at k=2; fail does not invalidate P1-P5 work

entries.decision: Test domain changed from MNIST to arithmetic expressions and linear equations
entries.rationale: Clean ground truth, verifiable reversibility, auditable rule paths, natural complexity ladder

entries.decision: Input encoding: binary tree per value node, no node attributes
entries.rationale: Consistent with no-attribute substrate; identity emerges from structure

entries.decision: Seed rules as bootstrap scaffold with defined lifecycle
entries.rationale: Library empty at training start; seed displacement is the success signal

entries.decision: Label format: terminal value for arithmetic, solved form graph for equations
entries.rationale: Allows library to learn value nodes and solved forms at appropriate layers independently

entries.decision: x = 3 is irreducible; x = x collapses to x
entries.rationale: Both sides of x = 3 are distinct — equality is not redundant

entries.decision: behaviour_personality chunk added as auto-load
entries.rationale: Authoritative version of communication rules with conditions, failure patterns, bidirectional discipline

entries.decision: workflow chunk added as on-demand
entries.rationale: General coding workflow not project-bound; load explicitly at implementation session start

entries.decision: session_lock chunk added
entries.rationale: Systematic data collection for ceiling calibration; triggered by user-reported erratic behavior

entries.decision: Soft ceilings: 3 auto-load chunks, 12 total session chunks
entries.rationale: Conservative starting points; revisable after 5 lock events provide calibration data

entries.decision: KB review sessions exempt from session chunk ceiling
entries.rationale: Full KB load during review is intentional, not accumulation drift

entries.decision: Framing bias documented as failure pattern
entries.rationale: Live example session 9: 'was this right?' vs 'correct or not?' produced different reliability

entries.decision: Premature recommendation documented as failure pattern
entries.rationale: Live example session 9: workflow/rationale split stated confidently then reversed

entries.decision: Workflow instructions embed conditions, not rationale
entries.rationale: Conditions define when rules apply; justifications are noise at retrieval time

entries.decision: restore() method added to PerspectiveGraph
entries.rationale: revert() in operations.py requires access to private state — encapsulating in a method prevents silent breakage when internal state grows

entries.decision: VS Code adopted as mandatory editor
entries.rationale: Notepad mixed tabs and spaces causing TabError — VS Code handles indentation correctly by default

entries.decision: from __future__ import annotations required in graph.py
entries.rationale: Self-referential type hint in restore() caused NameError without deferred annotation evaluation

entries.decision: perspective repo made public
entries.rationale: MCP token lacked private repo read scope; non-commercial project intended for sharing

entries.decision: Code presentation format rule added to meta.workflow
entries.rationale: Chunk-then-explanation interleaved format established — full file dumps followed by wall of explanation are not usable
